nl: For any move m, isHorizontal m is true exactly when isVertical m is false.
context:
set_option autoImplicit false

inductive Move : Type
| L
| R
| U
| D
deriving DecidableEq

def isHorizontal : Move → Bool
| Move.L => true
| Move.R => true
| _ => false

def isVertical : Move → Bool
| Move.U => true
| Move.D => true
| _ => false

def isAxis : Move → Bool
| Move.L => true
| Move.R => true
| Move.U => true
| Move.D => true
expected: ∀ m : Move, isHorizontal m = (! isVertical m)

provenance.notes: Deterministic finite truth-table items using small enums and Bool connectives.

nl: For any move m, isVertical m is true exactly when isHorizontal m is false.
context:
set_option autoImplicit false

inductive Move : Type
| L
| R
| U
| D
deriving DecidableEq

def isHorizontal : Move → Bool
| Move.L => true
| Move.R => true
| _ => false

def isVertical : Move → Bool
| Move.U => true
| Move.D => true
| _ => false

def isAxis : Move → Bool
| Move.L => true
| Move.R => true
| Move.U => true
| Move.D => true
expected: ∀ m : Move, isVertical m = (! isHorizontal m)

provenance.notes: Deterministic finite truth-table items using small enums and Bool connectives.

nl: For any move m, a move is horizontal or vertical, so (isHorizontal m || isVertical m) is always true.
context:
set_option autoImplicit false

inductive Move : Type
| L
| R
| U
| D
deriving DecidableEq

def isHorizontal : Move → Bool
| Move.L => true
| Move.R => true
| _ => false

def isVertical : Move → Bool
| Move.U => true
| Move.D => true
| _ => false

def isAxis : Move → Bool
| Move.L => true
| Move.R => true
| Move.U => true
| Move.D => true
expected: ∀ m : Move, ((isHorizontal m || isVertical m)) = true

provenance.notes: Deterministic finite truth-table items using small enums and Bool connectives.

nl: For any move m, a move cannot be both horizontal and vertical, so (isHorizontal m && isVertical m) is always false.
context:
set_option autoImplicit false

inductive Move : Type
| L
| R
| U
| D
deriving DecidableEq

def isHorizontal : Move → Bool
| Move.L => true
| Move.R => true
| _ => false

def isVertical : Move → Bool
| Move.U => true
| Move.D => true
| _ => false

def isAxis : Move → Bool
| Move.L => true
| Move.R => true
| Move.U => true
| Move.D => true
expected: ∀ m : Move, ((isHorizontal m && isVertical m)) = false

provenance.notes: Deterministic finite truth-table items using small enums and Bool connectives.

nl: For any Boolean flag b and move m, (b && isAxis m) equals b.
context:

inductive Move : Type
| L
| R
| U
| D
deriving DecidableEq

def isHorizontal : Move → Bool
| Move.L => true
| Move.R => true
| _ => false

def isVertical : Move → Bool
| Move.U => true
| Move.D => true
| _ => false

def isAxis : Move → Bool
| Move.L => true
| Move.R => true
| Move.U => true
| Move.D => true
expected: ∀ b : Bool, ∀ m : Move, ((b && isAxis m)) = b

provenance.notes: Deterministic finite truth-table items using small enums and Bool connectives.

nl: For any Boolean b and move m, (b || (b && isHorizontal m)) equals b.
context:
set_option autoImplicit false

inductive Move : Type
| L
| R
| U
| D
deriving DecidableEq

def isHorizontal : Move → Bool
| Move.L => true
| Move.R => true
| _ => false

def isVertical : Move → Bool
| Move.U => true
| Move.D => true
| _ => false

def isAxis : Move → Bool
| Move.L => true
| Move.R => true
| Move.U => true
| Move.D => true
expected: ∀ b : Bool, ∀ m : Move, ((b || (b && isHorizontal m))) = b

provenance.notes: Deterministic finite truth-table items using small enums and Bool connectives.

nl: For any booleans a, b, c, (a && (b || c)) equals ((a && b) || (a && c)).

provenance.notes: Deterministic finite truth-table items using small enums and Bool connectives.

nl: For any booleans a, b, c, (a || (b && c)) equals ((a || b) && (a || c)).

nl: For any booleans a and b, !(a && b) equals (!a || !b).
